member.name: M:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcUeiClient.UeiConfigureStreamingAsync
member.summary: Configures UEI streaming with the DTC UEI client FW. Only needs to be called once. must be called later to start streaming.

remarks.para: This API will issue a series of UEI commands (64-68) to establish the streaming setup with the UEI client.
After streaming is configured must be called to start streaming.
An exception will be thrown if streaming is currently running. Call before calling this API.
This will stream at the currently-set baud rate and streaming interval (4ms default). An exception will be thrown if the baud is too low.
Note that TOS auto-updates to the fastest baud during TOS init if the client supports UEI command 76

member.exception: If the call fails. will be set to if streaming is already running, as any new settings will not have taken effect.
If the returned streaming values from the DTC firmware do not match what's expected.

member.name: M:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcUeiClient.UeiStartStreamingAsync
member.summary: Sends the Start Streaming UEI command.

remarks.para: Starts UEI streaming by sending the StartStreaming UEI command.
This API must be be called after to start streaming.
This API must also be called after to re-start streaming.
This API allows configuring UEI streaming once and providing a quick way to Stop/Start streaming afterwards.
must be called before this API.
No exception will be thrown if streaming is already running.

member.name: M:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcUeiClient.UeiStopStreamingAsync
member.summary: Sends the Stop Streaming UEI command.

remarks.para: Stops any active UEI streaming by sending the StopStreaming UEI command.

member.name: M:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcUeiClient.AdjustControlSetValueAsync(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.UeiAdjustControlSetValueAction,HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.UeiControlSetValueId,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adjusts a control set value in the UEI client's control set.

remarks.param: The DUT index to modify the CS value of. This is the Pkg-level DUT index and does not correlate to different IPs for intraDUT. This maps to the DUT ordering in the .soc file.
The thermal zone index to modify the CS value of.
The Control Set index to modify. Set to all Fs for active CS or global setting. Exact behavior can be client-defined.
What action to take on the specified CS value.
Which field in the client's control set to adjust.

If == , set to this new value. If == , adjust existing value by specified amount. Clients can treat this as a float if needed: value = BitConverter.SingleToInt32Bits(float_delta) Client FW side (C++): float val = *(float*)(&uei_rx_data)

member.name: M:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcUeiClient.IsConnectedAsync
member.summary: Returns True if a UEI client is attached, by checking the UEI alive sideband line.
member.remarks: This does not communicate to the RCTC FW or UEI client.
member.returns: true if UEI client is attached, false if UEI client is not attached or on error.

member.name: M:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcUeiClient.GetSwVersionAsync(System.Byte)
member.summary: Sends a UEI command to request the SW version of the attached UEI client.

remarks.para: Sends the Get SW Version UEI command.

member.param: Which subsystem in the UEI client to retrieve the SW version of. Typically 0. See the UEI SW guide for more info.
member.returns: The version information returned by the client. Only and are populated

member.name: M:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcUeiClient.TargetIdTestAsync(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Sends the Target ID UEI command and compares against the expected UEI ID, to ensure the correct device is connected.
member.param:
The expected ID of the attached UEI client. UEI IDs are initially assigned by the TOS team to ensure they're unique.
Pass in 0 to skip the target ID check and return success if the client simply replied.
DIE_SORT_TEL_DTC has ID 0x56D4CCFC
member.exception: If the call fails. will be set to if the expected UEI ID and target UEI ID mismatch.

member.name: M:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcUeiClient.GotoSafeStateAsync
member.summary: Sends the UEI SafeState command to the UEI client.

member.name: M:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcUeiClient.ReadeRTDx2ModeAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: TReadeRTDx2ModeAsync is a custom DTC FW command and casn be called to display the temperature of the thermal head.
member.param: This is the Thermal Head ID, can be either 1 or 2
member.exception: If the call fails. will be set to if the expected UEI ID and target UEI ID mismatch.
If the value returned from the DTC firmware was out-of-range or returned an unexpected reply to the command.

member.name: M:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcUeiClient.IsTdynEnabledAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: The IsTdynEnabledAsync can be called to check if TDYN (Dynamic Temperature) is enabled (Output of 1) or not (Output of 0)
member.param: This is the Thermal Head ID, can be either 1 or 2
member.exception: If the call fails. will be set to if the expected UEI ID and target UEI ID mismatch.
If the value returned from the DTC firmware was out-of-range or returned an unexpected reply to the command.

member.name: T:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcClientCmdErtdX2ModeThReadRequest.Payload
member.summary: The payload for this command contains the thermal head ID

member.name: T:DtcUeiClientApi.DtcClientCmdTdynCheckRequest.Payload
member.summary: The payload for this command contains the thermal head ID
